base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of whip_ref_strip_leather — a projectile from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Leather whip isolated sprite — 3 extension lengths. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Leather whip isolated sprite — 3 extension lengths; starting weapon
